matches.summary: The UK government's £30 million Games Growth Package "is already making an impact" a year on from its launch, according to UK Creative Industries Minister
matches.title: UK Games Growth Package driving "exceptional demand" one year on from launch

matches.summary: Total video game sales in the US fell by a fifth year-on-year, with total projected video game sales estimated to have dropped from $5.7 billion to $4.5 billion between June 2025 and June 2026.
matches.title: Despite Xbox console sales doubling YoY, hardware sales across the US are down 62% | US Monthly Charts

matches.summary: Hasbro has recorded a $56 million impairment charge against its video game portfolio, confirming it has cancelled "several" games scheduled for release in 2028 and beyond.
matches.title: Hasbro records $56m write-down and cancels "several games" scheduled for 2028 and beyond

matches.summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 generated roughly $260 million in digital pre-orders during the last week of June, with Newzoo data indicating that $180 million was brought in across the US and five European markets (UK, France, Spain, Germany, and Italy).
matches.title: Newzoo: GTA 6 pre-orders generate estimated $260m globally during first week of campaign

matches.summary:
And a Sonic set, too.

A whole bunch of Lego sets based on Super Mario, The Legend of Zelda, Animal Crossing, and Sonic the Hedgehog are set to be retired next week.

You can check out Lego's own 'Retiring Soon' section to c
matches.title: Select Mario, Zelda, & Animal Crossing Lego Sets To Be Retired Next Week

note: Items flagged for manual review. No automatic fact emission.
